prompt: Print hello world in Jatti
code:
sun_we

ja_we

prompt: Create a variable and print it
code:

prompt: Create factorial function
code:
sun_we
    kaam factorial(n)
        je n barabar 0
            wapas_kar 1
        nahin_taan
            wapas_kar n * factorial(n - 1)

    chilla_we factorial(5)
ja_we

prompt: Make a loop that prints 1 to 5
code:
sun_we
    har_ek i range_banao(1, 6)
        chilla_we i
ja_we

prompt: Write an if else program
code:
sun_we
    chal_oye score ban 85
    je score vadha_ya_barabar 80
        chilla_we "Pass"
    nahin_taan
        chilla_we "Fail"
ja_we

prompt: Make a function and return words from a sentence
code:
sun_we
    kaam shabd_kadho(sentence)
        wapas_kar vand_karo(sentence, " ")

    chal_oye words ban shabd_kadho("this is a sentence")
    chilla_we words
ja_we

prompt: Check whether a string is a palindrome
code:
sun_we
    chal_oye text ban "level"
    chal_oye chars ban vand_karo(text, "")
    chal_oye rev ban ""
    har_ek ch chars
        chal_oye rev ban ch + rev
    je text barabar rev
        chilla_we "Palindrome"
    nahin_taan
        chilla_we "Not palindrome"
ja_we

code:

        je i % 2 barabar 0
            chilla_we i
ja_we

prompt: Use a while loop to count to five
code:

    jadon_tak count vadha_hai 5

        chal_oye count ban count + 1
ja_we

prompt: Print sum of first 10 natural numbers using while loop
code:
sun_we
    chal_oye count ban 1
    chal_oye total ban 0
    jadon_tak count vadha_hai 10
        chal_oye total ban total + count
        chal_oye count ban count + 1
    chilla_we total
ja_we

prompt: Check prime number
code:
sun_we
    kaam is_prime(n)
        je n < 2
            wapas_kar jhoot
        har_ek i range_banao(2, n)
            je n % i barabar 0
                wapas_kar jhoot
        wapas_kar sach

    chilla_we is_prime(7)
ja_we

prompt: Calculate Fibonacci sequence
code:
sun_we
    kaam fibonacci(n)
        je n barabar 0
            wapas_kar 0
        je n barabar 1
            wapas_kar 1
        nahin_taan
            wapas_kar fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2)

    har_ek i range_banao(0, 10)
        chilla_we fibonacci(i)
ja_we

prompt: Create a class and instantiate it
code:

        chal_oye self.name ban name
        chal_oye self.age ban age

    chal_oye p ban Person("Singh", 30)
    chilla_we p.name
    chilla_we p.age
ja_we

prompt: Create a function that checks if a number is prime
code:
sun_we
    kaam is_prime(n)
        je n < 2
            wapas_kar jhoot
        har_ek i range_banao(2, n)
            je n % i barabar 0
                wapas_kar jhoot
        wapas_kar sach

    chilla_we is_prime(11)
ja_we

prompt: Implement a simple calculator using functions
code:
sun_we
    kaam add(a, b)
        wapas_kar a + b
    kaam subtract(a, b)
        wapas_kar a - b
    kaam multiply(a, b)
        wapas_kar a * b
    kaam divide(a, b)
        je b barabar 0
            wapas_kar "Cannot divide by zero"
        nahin_taan
            wapas_kar a / b

    chilla_we add(10, 5)
    chilla_we subtract(10, 5)
    chilla_we multiply(10, 5)
    chilla_we divide(10, 0)
ja_we

prompt: Write a program to find the maximum number in a list
code:
sun_we
    chal_oye numbers ban [3, 5, 2, 8, 1]
    chal_oye max_num ban numbers[0]
    har_ek num numbers
        je num vadha_hai max_num
            chal_oye max_num ban num
    chilla_we max_num
ja_we

prompt: Implement a simple login system
code:
sun_we
    chal_oye username ban "user1"
    chal_oye password ban "pass123"
    chal_oye input_username ban "user1"
    chal_oye input_password ban "pass123"

    je input_username barabar username te input_password barabar password
        chilla_we "Login successful"
    nahin_taan
        chilla_we "Login failed"
ja_we

prompt: Create a function that reverses a string
code:
sun_we
    kaam reverse_string(s)
        chal_oye rev ban ""
        har_ek ch vand_karo(s, "")
            chal_oye rev ban ch + rev
        wapas_kar rev

    chilla_we reverse_string("hello")
ja_we

    chal_oye task3 ban "Pay bills"

    todo_list.append(task1)
    todo_list.append(task2)
    todo_list.append(task3)

    har_ek task todo_list
        chilla_we task
ja_we

prompt: Check if a person is an adult based on age input
code:
sun_we
    chal_oye age ban dasso("Enter your age: ")
    je age vadha_ya_barabar 18
        chilla_we "You are an adult."
    nahin_taan
        chilla_we "You are not an adult."
ja_we

sun_we
    chal_oye age_str ban dasso("Enter your age: ")
    chal_oye age ban ganao(age_str)
    je age vadha_ya_barabar 18
        chilla_we "You are an adult."
    nahin_taan
        chilla_we "You are not an adult."
ja_we
prompt: Check if a person is an adult based on age input
